title: After the Arima Kinen: Ramen to Wash Down the Win

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser defeats Nice Nature in the
Arima Kinen! After the race...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two of them go out for ramen. Nice Nature is
disappointed with her defeat, but the news
playing on TV at the ramen shop is full of praise
for her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taking a page out of Matikanetannhauser's book,
she stays optimistic and looks forward to the next
race. The two of them slurp their noodles and
prepare for next time.
